title: Danganronpa: The Animation
sourceNotes: 13-episode anime (Jul-Sep 2013). Manga complete at 17 chapters across 4 volumes (Shonen Ace, May 2013-Sep 2014), a close retelling of the same story. Arc boundaries follow the anime's own episode-title structure (Prologue / "(Not) Normal Arc" / Finale); precise chapter breakpoints within the middle block are approximate since no dedicated fan chapter guide was found.
